content.rendered:
On this page, you can find an overview of all articles related to Finnish phonology, ie. the sounds of the language.

Finnish phonology

FINNISH PHONOLOGY

1. Important phonological phenomenons

    • Long and short sounds
    • Vowel harmony
    • Vowel harmony exceptions
    • Consonant gradation
    • Why doesn’t siivota become siipoan?

2. Deviations from regular pronunciation

  • Banaani vs panaani
  • Vanha vs wanha
  • Pöydällä vs pöyrällä
  • Kolome kylymää kahavia
  • Politiikka vs poliitikko
  • Menep pois (boundary gemination)

excerpt.rendered: On this page, you can find an overview of all articles related to Finnish phonology, ie. the sounds of the language.
